TikTok automatically adds a watermark with the creator's username on every downloaded video. While this helps credit creators, there are legitimate reasons to want a clean version — repurposing for presentations, creating compilations, or simply having a cleaner viewing experience.

Why Download TikTok Videos Without Watermark?

TikTok has become the world's most popular short-form video platform, with billions of videos being shared every day. Whether you're a content creator looking to repurpose your own videos, a teacher wanting to use educational content in presentations, or simply someone who wants to save entertaining clips for offline viewing — downloading TikTok videos without the watermark is a common need.

The TikTok watermark includes the creator's username and the TikTok logo, which can be distracting when you want to use videos for personal archives, presentations, or creative projects. That's where a free TikTok downloader like NoMark comes in.

Step-by-Step: Download TikTok Videos Without Watermark

Step 1: Find the Video on TikTok

Open the TikTok app on your phone or visit tiktok.com on your browser. Navigate to the video you want to download.

Step 2: Copy the Video Link

Tap the Share button (arrow icon) on the video, then tap Copy Link. On desktop, you can copy the URL directly from your browser's address bar.

Step 3: Paste the Link into NoMark

Go to NoMark and paste the copied link into the input field. You'll see a text field that says "Paste TikTok or Instagram video link..." — click on it and paste your URL.

Step 4: Click Analyze Link

Hit the green Analyze Link button. NoMark will process the video within seconds.

Step 5: Download Your Video

Once processing is complete, you'll see download options. Choose Download HD (No Watermark) for the best quality without any watermark overlay.

Does This Work on All Devices?

Yes! NoMark is a web-based tool that works on:

  • iPhone & iPad: Works in Safari, Chrome, and any mobile browser
  • Android: Works in Chrome, Samsung Browser, Firefox, and more
  • Windows & Mac: Works in any desktop browser

There's no need to install any app or create an account. Just paste your link and download.

What Video Quality Can I Expect?

NoMark fetches the original video file from TikTok's servers, which means you get the highest quality available — typically 720p or 1080p, depending on the original upload quality. The video is downloaded as an MP4 file that's compatible with all video players.

Is It Safe to Use?

Absolutely. NoMark doesn't ask for your TikTok login, doesn't store your personal data, and doesn't keep copies of downloaded videos. The entire process is handled securely through our servers.

Tips for Best Results

  • Make sure the video is publicly available — private videos cannot be downloaded
  • Use the original TikTok link, not a shortened or modified URL
  • If a link doesn't work, try copying it again from the TikTok app
  • For the highest quality, always choose the HD download option

Can I Download TikTok Audio Only?

Yes! NoMark also offers an audio download option. If you just want the sound or music from a TikTok video, you can download it as an MP3 file. This is perfect for saving trending sounds or music clips.

Ready to Download?

It's completely free, fast, and requires no signup. Paste your TikTok link and download now →
